verdicts.reason: restaurant charcuterie/tapas board with salami, salmon and pickles — completely off-topic
raw rolled oats spilling from a jar — not overnight oats
Flux bowl of orange chickpea curry over rice with herbs — reads as chana masala, hero composition
aerial view of the Dead Sea beach with sun umbrellas, completely off-topic
raw fresh pasta strands (tagliatelle) on a board, not pancakes
closed grilled-cheese panini sandwich — cheese on toast is the British open-faced version, not this
hand crumbling rubbed-in flour-and-butter in a bowl — prep step, not the finished scones
same flour-rubbing prep image — not the finished savory scones
raw fresh pasta sheets/strands on parchment, not the baked cheesy snack
vintage illustration/painting of a sea bass — not the cooked chermoula dish
sweet-and-sour Chinese chicken with peppers and pineapple — wrong cuisine
slice of a meat pie with chunky filling, pastry top, served with chips and salad — reads as a savory meat pie, acceptable hero
BBQ-style spicy chicken drumsticks on a wire rack — chasseur is the French stew with mushroom/wine/tomato sauce
teriyaki-glazed Japanese-style chicken thigh on a hot plate with cabbage — wrong cuisine and dish
raw meat-and-veg filling spread on dumpling dough with rolling pin — prep step, not the finished pleated dumplings
Indian tandoor platter with three colored chicken preparations and sauces — jalfrezi is a thick pepper-tomato curry, not these
creamy orange-tan Indian chicken curry with cream drizzle and cilantro — slightly more butter-chicken than classic pale korma but the creamy-chicken-curry read is acceptable
raw whole chicken with carrots and onions on a wooden board
raw chicken thighs on a wooden board with peppers
same BBQ-drumstick image — missing preserved lemons and Moroccan styling
raw chicken breasts in a dark bowl with spices on the side — not the iconic creamy orange masala
seeded bread roll with rolled parma ham slices on a black plate — bread, not chicken
Mediterranean salad with arugula, chickpeas, feta and olives plus olive oil and lemon — clean hero
olive oil being poured into a bowl with whole olives — completely off-topic
raw ground beef in a glass bowl — not the cooked chili
dried whole red chilies in a small glass bowl — not the cooked jam
chocolate yule log being sliced on a wood round with pine sprigs, candle, fairy lights — hero composition
close-up of dried dates, not fudge
two soft-baked chocolate chip cookies with a milk bottle behind — hero composition
two elegant eclairs with white glaze and meringue dots on gold cards — hero composition
layered chocolate mousse parfait in a glass with berries and tulips — not stuffed cookies
chocolate layer cake topped with caramel and mixed berries — strong hero
